name: Sandbag Move

movements.notes: down the stadium stairs, across the floor, up a wall, and up the far stairs

description: Carrying a heavy sandbag down the stadium stairs, across the floor, up a wall, and up the far stairs — a single-movement venue-specific carry.
source_notes: games.crossfit.com/workouts/games/2010/4 (official CrossFit Games event, individual division), retrieved 2026-07-10
